feat.name: Spirits' Interference
feat.text: You call forth protective spirits to ward off ranged attacks. Until your rage ends, anyone making a ranged attack against you must succeed at a DC 5 flat check or the attack misses with no effect.

traits.name: Barbarian
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the barbarian class.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.

traits.name: Rage
traits.text: You must be raging to use abilities with the rage trait, and they end automatically when you stop raging.
